# RAG sources and memory

## Memory stores

```text
official platform sources
academic evidence
grey-source benchmarks
creative genome database
historical metrics
comment analysis
failed hypotheses
scaled mechanisms
niche glossary
brand rules
```

## Retrieval rules

```text
Official platform docs outrank grey sources.
Academic evidence outranks creator folklore.
Own analytics outrank benchmark averages.
Current sources outrank stale sources for platform behaviour.
```

## Memory update after every batch

```text
new winner mechanisms
new failure modes
baseline shifts
platform-specific discoveries
viewer language
search terms
trust issues
new hypotheses
```
